duas.title: A’mal of Surah Yaseen
duas.description:
Recommended for 15th of Shaban
Recite Soorah Yaseen 3 times with intentions as stated below:
(i) Once for long life
(ii) Once for prosperity.
(iii) Once for safety from misfortune.
Then recite the following 21 times, without speaking in between:
duas.arabic:
اَللهُمَّ اِنَّكَ عَظِيْمٌ ذُوْ اَناَةٍ وَلَا طَاقَةَ لَنَا لِحُكْمِكَ يَا اللهُ يَا اللهُ يَا اللهُ اَلْاَمَان اَلْاَمَان اَلْاَمَان
مِنَ الطَّاعُوْنِ وَالْوَبَآءِوَمَوْتِ فَجَعَةٍ وَسُوْءِ الْقَضَآءٍ وَ شمَتَتِ الْعَادَآءِ رَبَّنَا نَكْشِفْ عَنَّا الْعَذَابَ اِنَّا مُوْمِنُنَ بِرَحْمَتِكَ يَا اَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ
duas.transliteration:
Allaahumma Innak A’zeemun D’u Anaatin Wa Laa T’aaqata Lanaa Li—h’ukmika Yaa Allah Yaa Allah Yaa Allah Al —amaan Al —amaan Al —amaan;
Minat T’aa--o’on Wal Wabaaa—i Wa Mawti Faja—a’tin Wa Soo—il Qaz”aaa-i Wa Shamatatil Aa’—aaaa—i Rabbanak—shif A’nnal A’x’aaba Innaa Moo—minoona Bi—rah’matika Yaa Arh’amar Rah’imeen
duas.translation:
O Allah, verily Thou art Sublime, Patient, gives respite, (because) we do not have the capacity to withstand the conditions that take effect under Thy authority. O Allah! O Allah! O Allah! Mercy! Mercy! Mercy!
(Safety from the) rampant epidemics, accidental death, evil events, and rejoicing of enemies at (our) misfortune. O our Lord take away from us the pain and torment, truly we believe in Thy Mercy, O the most Merciful!

segments.arabic: اَللهُمَّ اِنَّكَ عَظِيْمٌ ذُوْ اَناَةٍ وَلَا طَاقَةَ لَنَا لِحُكْمِكَ يَا اللهُ يَا اللهُ يَا اللهُ اَلْاَمَان اَلْاَمَان اَلْاَمَان
segments.transliteration: Allaahumma Innak A’zeemun D’u Anaatin Wa Laa T’aaqata Lanaa Li—h’ukmika Yaa Allah Yaa Allah Yaa Allah Al —amaan Al —amaan Al —amaan;
segments.translation: O Allah, verily Thou art Sublime, Patient, gives respite, (because) we do not have the capacity to withstand the conditions that take effect under Thy authority. O Allah! O Allah! O Allah! Mercy! Mercy! Mercy!

segments.arabic: مِنَ الطَّاعُوْنِ وَالْوَبَآءِوَمَوْتِ فَجَعَةٍ وَسُوْءِ الْقَضَآءٍ وَ شمَتَتِ الْعَادَآءِ رَبَّنَا نَكْشِفْ عَنَّا الْعَذَابَ اِنَّا مُوْمِنُنَ بِرَحْمَتِكَ يَا اَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: Minat T’aa--o’on Wal Wabaaa—i Wa Mawti Faja—a’tin Wa Soo—il Qaz”aaa-i Wa Shamatatil Aa’—aaaa—i Rabbanak—shif A’nnal A’x’aaba Innaa Moo—minoona Bi—rah’matika Yaa Arh’amar Rah’imeen
segments.translation: (Safety from the) rampant epidemics, accidental death, evil events, and rejoicing of enemies at (our) misfortune. O our Lord take away from us the pain and torment, truly we believe in Thy Mercy, O the most Merciful!

duas.reference: Tahfat al Radhwia from Sayyid MuhammadRadhi razawi Kashmiri
